source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/04_제품별 인허가 진행 문서/04_2G & 3G (A1417MCW, A1717MCW, F1417MCW)/▶ 국내 제조인증/1. 최초/03 기술문서 심사에 관한 자료/03 제품의 성능 및 안전을 확인하기 위한 자료/04 성능에 관한 자료/성능시험성적서.pdf

document.title: A1417MCW, A1717MCW, F1417MCW Detector Production inspection (Release) Report
document.documentType: Performance test report / production inspection release report

sourceSummary.oneLine: Production inspection release reports record safety, visual, X-ray performance, mechanical, combination, final image, DICOM, and instrument checks for A1417MCW, A1717MCW, and F1417MCW detectors.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports domestic manufacturing certification technical documentation by providing performance and safety confirmation data for detector product models.
keyPoints: A1417MCW model code AMI90-03733D passed production inspection on 2022-10-05.
A1717MCW model code AMI90-03736D passed production inspection on 2022-10-22.
F1417MCW model code AMI90-06231A passed production inspection on 2022-10-30.
Safety Standard section includes protective earth resistance, dielectric strength, leakage current, touch current, and power input tests.
Final Image Test includes detector defect criteria and console software checks including DICOM transfer and print.

evidence.claim: The Safety Standard section includes protective earth conductor resistance testing.
evidence.evidenceText: Protective earth conductor resistance test (보호접지저항시험) 10sec, 100mΩ, 25A Ω ≤ 0.1Ω PASS

evidence.claim: The Safety Standard section includes dielectric strength testing for primary-earth, primary-enclosure, and primary-patient applied part paths.
evidence.evidenceText: Dielectric strength test (내전압 시험) Primary - Earth (1차-접지) 1500VAC, 60sec; Primary - Enclusure (1차-외장) 4000VAC, 60sec; Primary - Patient appied part (1차-환자 접촉) 4000VAC, 60sec

evidence.claim: The reports include X-ray performance characteristics and mechanical information sections.
The reports include combination testing for recharger, battery, detector, battery cover, power supply, and main cable.
evidence.evidenceText: 6. Combination Test; Recharger; Battery & Recharger; Detector & Battery; Detector & Battery Cover; Detector & Power supply & Main cable

evidence.claim: The final image test includes detector defect criteria for distortion, block state, crosstalk, stain, bad pixel, bad line, mixed video, and back-up mAs or AEC feedback errors.
evidence.evidenceText: 7. Final Image Test (Image Performance); 영상 영역내에 이상 또는 간섭 등으로 인한 영상 왜곡이 없을 것; Bad Pixel이 육안 식별 되지 않을 것; Bad Line이 육안 식별 되지 않을 것; Back-up mAs error or AEC Feedback error should not occur

evidence.claim: Console software checks include security, search, image acquisition, image storage, image transfer, program closing, DICOM transfer, DICOM print, zoom, rotation, contrast adjustment, and partial magnification.
evidence.evidenceText: Console Software; 보안기능 PASS; 검색기능 PASS; 영상획득 PASS; 영상저장 PASS; 영상전송 PASS; 프로그램 닫기 PASS; DICOM 적합성; 전송 PASS; 출력 PASS; 확대/축소 PASS; 회전 PASS; 대조도 조절 PASS; 부분확대 PASS

evidence.claim: The source includes measuring instrument information with management number, serial number, model, manufacturer, and calibration date.
evidence.evidenceText: ■ 사용 계측기 정보 NO 관리 번호 Serial No Model 제조원 교정일자

reviewFlags.reason: Authority is derived from source metadata authoritySignal and sourcePath domestic manufacturing certification context; the report text itself does not name MFDS.
The combined source contains multiple reports with different dates and revisions, so a single document date or revision is not uniquely determined.
F1417MCW section shows AQ-20220930-005 (VER.00) but later pages show F-DUYO-0033K-01 (Ver. 23), indicating mixed or conflicting revision evidence.
OCR/text extraction has minor spelling and ordering issues such as 'Enclusure', 'appied', and separated table columns.
No explicit external performance standard number such as IEC or ISO is present in the source text.
